data.title: sprint: implementation-plan plan review (Step 4) used generic agent instead of reviewer sub-agents
data.description: During /dso:sprint → /dso:implementation-plan Step 4 for story ce63-4a2a, the Stage 2 plan review dispatched a generic general-purpose sub-agent (model: sonnet) with an ad-hoc multi-perspective rubric prompt instead of following the REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md. The reviewer files at plugins/dso/docs/reviewers/plan/{task-design,tdd,safety,dependencies,completeness}.md were found to be missing (ls returned nothing), but the correct fallback per the workflow is to surface that error, not to write an inline prompt approximating the review. The plan review step should fail loudly when reviewer files are absent rather than substituting a generic agent.
